name: legion
description: The top tool for AI augmented development — a full AI agent army for any codebase. Deploys wiki-guardian (entity-graph wiki with [[backlinks]], ADR detection, contradiction protocol), library-guardian (module narrative + PRD authorship), mind-guardian (cognitive layer: RAG, coach routing, memory, evaluation), auth-guardian, db-guardian, devops-guardian, payments-guardian, quality-guardian, security-guardian, react-guardian, ux-ui-guardian, design-system-guardian, seo-aeo-guardian, and asset-guardian. Runs document/update/lint passes with parallel agent invocation, reconciles a compounding wiki, surfaces entity hovers and code-lens in the editor, generates Mermaid entity graphs, posts PR wiki diffs via GitHub Actions, and federates entity stubs across repos.

chatParticipants.name: legion
chatParticipants.description: Ask questions answered from your Legion wiki. Grounded in entity pages, ADRs, and git context.

commands.title: Legion: Explain Why This Was Built

enumDescriptions: Default. Invokes guardians via the official @cursor/sdk (Cursor TypeScript SDK) using a local-runtime agent. Requires legion.cursorApiKey or CURSOR_API_KEY env var (paid Cursor plan).

DEPRECATED alias for cursor-sdk. v1.0.x shelled out to `cursor agent <name> --input <path>`, but that headless CLI surface was never publicly supported by Cursor — it silently produced unparseable output. Existing configs naming cursor-cli now route through the SDK transparently.
Write JSON request files to `.legion/queue/`. A Cursor slash command (`/legion-drain`) processes them. Manual but reliable.
Call Anthropic API (or OpenRouter) directly. Bypasses Cursor entirely — works on every platform, no Cursor subscription needed. Requires legion.anthropicApiKey or LEGION_ANTHROPIC_API_KEY env var.
legion.agentInvocationMode.markdownDescription: How the extension invokes wiki-guardian and library-guardian. **Changed in v1.1.0**: default is now `cursor-sdk` (was `cursor-cli`, which silently produced garbage). Set this to `direct-anthropic-api` if you don't have a Cursor API key.

legion.cursorApiKey.markdownDescription: Cursor API key for the `cursor-sdk` invocation mode. Get one at [cursor.com/dashboard/cloud-agents](https://cursor.com/dashboard/cloud-agents) (requires a paid Cursor plan). **v1.2.0+:** keys are stored in encrypted OS secret storage (DPAPI / Keychain / libsecret) — entering a value here copies it to SecretStorage and clears this field. Prefer using **Legion: Setup Wizard** or the `CURSOR_API_KEY` environment variable instead.

legion.cursorSdkModel.markdownDescription: Model ID for the `cursor-sdk` invocation mode. Default `composer-2` is Cursor's current general-purpose recommendation. Use `auto` to let the server pick. Browse available models with `Cursor.models.list()` from the SDK.

legion.anthropicApiKey.markdownDescription: Required when `#legion.agentInvocationMode#` is `direct-anthropic-api`. **v1.2.0+:** stored in encrypted OS secret storage — entering a value here copies it to SecretStorage and clears this field. Use **Legion: Setup Wizard** or set `LEGION_ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` environment variable instead.

legion.cursorCliPath.markdownDescription: **Deprecated since v1.1.0.** Was the path to Cursor's CLI binary, used by the old `cursor-cli` invocation mode that shelled out to `cursor agent <name> --input <path>`. That CLI surface was never publicly supported by Cursor and the path is now unused — `cursor-cli` mode transparently routes through `@cursor/sdk` instead. This setting will be removed in v2.0.

legion.maxParallelAgents.description: Maximum number of agent invocations to run in parallel during Document/Update.

legion.installPostCommitHook.description: Install a post-commit git hook that queues Update on every commit. (v0.2.0+)

legion.federation.publishManifest.description: After each reconcile pass, write federation-manifest.json with all entity stubs so peer repos can reference your entities.

legion.federation.peers.markdownDescription: URLs to remote `federation-manifest.json` files (e.g. raw GitHub URLs). Legion fetches these and writes read-only stub pages to `library/knowledge-base/wiki/external/<repo>/`.

legion.injectCursorContext.description: After each Document/Update pass, write .cursor/rules/wiki-hot-context.md with the hot cache so Cursor automatically loads recent wiki context in chat sessions.

legion.showCodeLens.description: Show 'Legion wiki page' code lens above function/class definitions that have a matching entity page.

legion.obsidianVaultPath.markdownDescription: Absolute path to your Obsidian vault folder. When set, the **Open in Obsidian** sidebar button jumps to `library/knowledge-base/wiki/` inside that vault. The vault must already be open in Obsidian at least once so Obsidian registers its name.

enumDescriptions: Direct Anthropic API. Requires legion.anthropicApiKey. Supports Claude models only.
OpenRouter gateway. Requires legion.openRouterApiKey. Supports 300+ models: Claude, GPT-4o, Gemini, Llama, Mistral, and more.
legion.apiProvider.description: Which LLM API provider Legion uses for direct-anthropic-api mode and Autoresearch.

legion.openRouterApiKey.markdownDescription: OpenRouter API key. Get yours at [openrouter.ai/keys](https://openrouter.ai/keys). Also accepts `LEGION_OPENROUTER_API_KEY` environment variable. Required when `legion.apiProvider` is `openrouter`. **v1.2.0+:** entering a value here copies it to encrypted OS secret storage (DPAPI / Keychain / libsecret) and clears this field — use **Legion: Setup Wizard** for a guided experience.

legion.openRouterModel.markdownDescription: Model to use when `legion.apiProvider` is `openrouter`. Use the fully-qualified OpenRouter model ID, e.g. `anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-5`, `openai/gpt-4o`, `google/gemini-pro`, `meta-llama/llama-3.1-70b-instruct`. Browse available models at [openrouter.ai/models](https://openrouter.ai/models).

legion.model.description: Claude model used when legion.apiProvider is 'anthropic'. Ignored when using OpenRouter (use legion.openRouterModel instead).

legion.logFoldK.description: k value for log folding: folds 2^k entries into a checkpoint page. Default 3 → 8 entries.

legion.researchRounds.description: Number of synthesis rounds for Autoresearch. More rounds = deeper coverage, more API calls.

enumDescriptions: Use Anthropic model knowledge only — no web calls. Fast, no extra API key needed.
Exa neural web search — finds semantically relevant pages, extracts clean text. Requires legion.exaApiKey.
Firecrawl — searches and scrapes web pages as clean markdown. Requires legion.firecrawlApiKey.
Context7 — fetches official library/framework documentation. Best for technology topics. No key required for basic use.
legion.researchProvider.description: Web search provider for Autoresearch. Grounding synthesis in real web content produces more accurate, up-to-date wiki pages.

legion.exaApiKey.markdownDescription: Exa API key for Autoresearch web search. Get yours at [exa.ai](https://exa.ai). Also accepts `LEGION_EXA_API_KEY` environment variable. **v1.2.0+:** entering a value here copies it to encrypted OS secret storage and clears this field.

legion.firecrawlApiKey.markdownDescription: Firecrawl API key for Autoresearch web scraping and Ingest URL. Get yours at [firecrawl.dev](https://firecrawl.dev). Also accepts `LEGION_FIRECRAWL_API_KEY` environment variable. **v1.2.0+:** entering a value here copies it to encrypted OS secret storage and clears this field.

legion.context7ApiKey.markdownDescription: Context7 API key for higher-rate library documentation access. Optional — Context7 works without a key for basic usage. Also accepts `LEGION_CONTEXT7_API_KEY` environment variable. **v1.2.0+:** entering a value here copies it to encrypted OS secret storage and clears this field.

legion.researchMaxResults.description: Maximum number of search results to fetch per research round when a web provider is configured.

legion.contractValidation.description: On every file save, compare exported function signatures against wiki entity pages and show a warning when they diverge.

legion.autoGitCommit.description: Auto-commit wiki changes to git after each Document/Update pass (equivalent to claude-obsidian's PostToolUse hook).

legion.semanticSearchEnabled.description: Enable semantic search (Cohere or TF-IDF) for Find Entity. When false, uses the original fuzzy string match.

legion.cohereApiKey.markdownDescription: Cohere API key for semantic search embeddings (Find Entity). Also accepts `LEGION_COHERE_API_KEY` environment variable. When empty, TF-IDF fallback is used (no API key required). **v1.2.0+:** entering a value here copies it to encrypted OS secret storage and clears this field.

legion.researchSchedule.markdownDescription: Cron expression for automatic research agenda draining. Examples: `"0 9 * * 1"` (Monday 9am), `"0 8 * * *"` (daily 8am). Empty string disables. Requires `legion.researchScheduleEnabled`.

legion.researchScheduleEnabled.description: Safety gate — must be explicitly set to true for the research schedule to fire.

legion.activeRoot.description: Pin a specific workspace folder path for all Legion commands. When set, skips the workspace root picker. Relative paths resolved from the first workspace folder.

legion.scanRoots.markdownDescription: Monorepo sub-paths to scan as separate module groups (e.g. `["packages/api", "packages/web"]`). Empty = single-root mode.

legion.wikiRoot.description: Override the default wiki output path. Default: <repoRoot>/library/knowledge-base/wiki/. Relative paths resolved from repo root.

enumDescriptions: Docusaurus v3 — generates MDX files, sidebars.js, and docusaurus.config.js. Run npx docusaurus build to publish.
Static HTML — self-contained site with sidebar nav. Open index.html directly in a browser.
Markdown Bundle — flat copy of the wiki tree. Import into Confluence, Notion, or GitBook.
legion.exportTarget.description: Default export format for legion.exportWiki. The format QuickPick always lets you choose a different format per run.

legion.exportOutputDir.description: Output directory for wiki exports. Relative paths resolved from repo root.

legion.injectClaudeContext.description: After each reconcile pass, write or update a ## Legion Wiki section in CLAUDE.md at the repo root. Claude Code auto-loads this file at session start, giving it immediate wiki routing context.

legion.guardianRegistryUrl.description: URL of the Legion community guardian registry JSON file. Override to use a private or fork registry.

scripts.compile:all: npm run compile && npm run compile:cli && npm run compile:mcp
scripts.package: npm run snapshot && npm run compile:all -- --minify && vsce package --baseContentUrl https://github.com/thenotoriousllama/legion/raw/HEAD --baseImagesUrl https://github.com/thenotoriousllama/legion/raw/HEAD
scripts.package:platform: npm run snapshot && npm run compile:all -- --minify && vsce package --target $TARGET --baseContentUrl https://github.com/thenotoriousllama/legion/raw/HEAD --baseImagesUrl https://github.com/thenotoriousllama/legion/raw/HEAD
